demo_timestamps.description: Qflow system capturing data on material deliveries and extracting text from documents

themes: Improving data flow in construction phases

client_mentions.name: Qflow
client_mentions.context: Qflow works with general contractors, developers, and asset owners to track materials and prevent construction rework

summary: The video discusses how Qflow and Autodesk use AI and technology to reduce construction rework and waste by improving data flow between the design and construction phases. By digitizing material tracking and integrating systems like Qflow and Autodesk Forma, the process aims to prevent discrepancies and support sustainable outcomes in construction projects.
